summary: Applied ADR 0292 from the latest realistic origin/main baseline by converging Apache Superset on docker-runtime-lv3, publishing bi.example.com through the shared NGINX edge, wiring the Keycloak OIDC client plus OpenBao-backed runtime secrets, reconciling the read-only PostgreSQL and Plausible ClickHouse datasource inventory together with the landing dashboard, and capturing fresh guest-local plus public verification after the replay completed cleanly on the synchronized 0.177.128 tree.

verification.check: Focused Superset and shared-contract regression coverage
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest tests/test_superset_runtime_role.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py tests/test_superset_playbook.py tests/test_openbao_compose_env_helper.py tests/test_openbao_systemd_credentials_helper.py tests/test_compose_runtime_secret_injection.py tests/test_docker_runtime_role.py tests/test_keycloak_runtime_role.py` returned `104 passed in 7.24s`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-targeted-tests-r2.txt`.

verification.check: Latest-main validation slice and SFTPGo compatibility repair
verification.observed: `./scripts/validate_repo.sh retry-guard workstream-surfaces data-models` passed after the refreshed latest-main contracts landed, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-validation-slice-r3.txt`, and `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest -q tests/test_sftpgo_playbook.py` then returned `4 passed in 0.06s`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-sftpgo-compat-tests-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Governed Superset converge replay from the synchronized branch tip
verification.observed: `make converge-superset env=production` succeeded with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=325 changed=7 failed=0`, `localhost : ok=24 changed=0 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=46 changed=5 failed=0`, and `postgres-lv3 : ok=80 changed=0 failed=0`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-live-apply-r1.txt`.

Direct verification on `docker-runtime-lv3` confirmed `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8105/health` returned `OK`, both `superset` and `superset-openbao-agent` containers were healthy, and `verify-local` reported the managed dataset, chart, dashboard, and datasource connectivity contract; the transcript is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-direct-runtime-verification-r1.txt`.

verification.check: Fresh public publication and metadata verification
verification.observed: Direct controller verification confirmed `https://bi.example.com/health` returned `OK`, the public `login/keycloak` handoff redirects to `sso.example.com`, and the authenticated public API still exposed the expected 31 datasource registrations plus the repo-managed dashboard and chart; the transcript is preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-01-ws-0292-superset-public-verification-r1.txt`.

notes: This receipt captures the branch-local ADR 0292 proof on top of repository version 0.177.128 before the protected release surfaces are cut.

The synchronized branch had to absorb two exact-main compatibility repairs outside the Superset runtime itself: `scripts/restic_config_backup.py` now uses the shared retry helper and the latest-main Vikunja/SFTPGo merge required restored ansible-scope plus Makefile execution contracts before the shared validation slices would pass again.

Merge-to-main still needs to cut the protected release surfaces, rerun the governed Superset replay from that exact-main tree, record the canonical mainline receipt, and refresh `README.md`, `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, `versions/stack.yaml`, `docs/adr/.index.yaml`, and other generated truth surfaces.
